docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAN, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT KUZNECOVS, SERGEIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAN, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUZNECOVS, SERGEIS $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 SERVED OCT-04-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KUZNECOVS, SERGEIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARY CAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SERGEIS KUZNECOVS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.
